title: Ligg Panat
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image= |name=Ligg Panat |homeworld=[[Sanza|Krish]] |birth= |death=[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], over [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] |species=[[Krish (species)/Legends|Krish]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Seven, this is Lead. On my mark, reverse throttle, break port.''"
"''Lead, I can handle—''"
"''This is an order, Seven. On my mark. Mark.|Gavin Darklighter and Ligg Panat, while first encountering Yuuzhan Vong coralskippers|''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]''}} [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Ligg Panat''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Krish (species)/Legends|Krish]] serving in [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] at the start of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. Flying under [[Rogue Leader/Legends|Rogue Leader]] [[Gavin Darklighter]], she had the callsign [[Rogue Seven/Legends|Rogue Seven]], and she approached [[Starfighter combat/Legends|combat]] as though it were a game, reflecting her [[Species/Legends|species']] enthusiasm for sport and play. ==Biography== Ligg Panat, a [[Krish (species)/Legends|Krish]] [[Gender|female]], was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served in the famed [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] at the start of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. She was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] who flew as [[Rogue Seven/Legends|Rogue Seven]]. At the beginning of that war, Rogue Squadron were recruited by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet]] to investigate the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] after a report from [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] of an invading [[Praetorite Vong|alien force]] was met with disinterest by the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]]. Officially, the Rogues would be simulating [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] attacks on Kre'fey's [[Bothan Assault Cruiser]], the ''[[Ralroost]]'', so as not to openly defy the Senate. In the Outer Rim, Panat and the rest of the Rogues [[Third skirmish in the Outer Rim|faced off]] against the [[Yorik-et|coralskipper]] fighter craft of the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]], and two members of the squadron, [[Tik (Rogue Squadron)|Tik]] and [[Dinger]], were [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a miniature [[Black hole/Legends|black hole]] created by the coralskippers' [[dovin basal]] vortices. The Rogues faced off against more coralskippers while the ''Ralroost'' helped [[Evacuation of Dubrillion|evacuate]] [[Agamarian]] [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]] from [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]]. Without enough supplies for a long-distance [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jump, the [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] carrying the refugees landed on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]], and Rogue Squadron were part of a small force that defended them from a Yuuzhan Vong onslaught in the [[Battle of Dantooine (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Dantooine]]. Panat was one of six Rogue pilots who were killed by coralskippers in the battle, which also saw Yuuzhan Vong [[Warrior caste|warriors]] murder half of the refugees. The survivors were relocated to [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]] before the remaining Rogues returned to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] aboard the ''Ralroost''. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{StartBox}} {{SuccessionBox |title=[[Rogue Seven/Legends|Rogue Seven]] |years=[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] |before=Eventually [[Myn Donos]] |after=Eventually [[Dakorse Teep]] }} {{EndBox}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Ligg Panat#legends |pl=Ligg Panat }} [[Category:Females|Panat, Ligg]] [[Category:Krish|Panat, Ligg]] [[Category:Rogue Squadron personnel|Panat, Ligg]]
